rawOutput:
<Column>
  <Card>
    <Column>
      <Text variant="section-title">个人资料</Text>
      <Avatar size="medium" shape="circle" />
      <Input type="text" bind="name" placeholder="请输入姓名" />
      <Button variant="primary" onTap="save_profile">保存</Button>
    </Column>
  </Card>
  <Card>
    <Column>
      <Text variant="section-title">通知偏好</Text>
      <Toggle bind="email_notif" label="邮件通知" />
      <Toggle bind="sms_notif" label="短信通知" />
      <Toggle bind="push_notif" label="推送通知" />
    </Column>
  </Card>
  <Card>
    <Column>
      <Text variant="section-title">账户操作</Text>
      <Button variant="secondary" onTap="deactivate">注销账户</Button>
    </Column>
  </Card>
</Column>
